entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used as a source of proteins, minerals, and vitamins, with multiple uses including food, feed, and soil enrichment

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: An international research organization that conserves pigeonpea accessions

entities.name: GENEBANK
entities.description: A facility that conserves a large number of germplasm accessions

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop cultivars for better yield or traits

entities.name: GERMPLASM ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Genetic resources collected for use in breeding and crop improvement

entities.name: GENERATION CHALLENGE PROGRAM
entities.description: A program that collaborated with ICRISAT to develop a composite collection of pigeonpea

entities.name: COMPOSITE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 1000 pigeonpea accessions representing the diversity of the entire germplasm collection

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A subset of accessions included within the composite collection

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Microsatellite or simple sequence repeat markers used to separate wild and cultivated types

entities.name: REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A set of 300 most diverse accessions selected based on genotyping data

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of observing and measuring physical traits of an organism

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic trait identified in 96 diverse accessions

entities.name: HIGH NUMBER OF PODS
entities.description: An agronomic trait identified in 28 diverse accessions

entities.name: HIGH 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic trait identified in 88 diverse accessions

entities.name: HIGH SEED YIELD/PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic trait identified in 49 diverse accessions

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Programs aimed at developing improved cultivars with a broad genetic base

entities.name: ABIOTIC AND BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental and biological pressures that pigeonpea germplasm provides resistance to

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A genetic trait utilized in breeding programmes
